voice_meta.rationale: Mexican accent is the dominant Spanish accent in South Florida (Weston/Pembroke Pines/Davie). Middle-aged conveys experience and trust — matches HandyMan Pro positioning. ElevenLabs provider gives best bilingual EN+ES rendering.

_llm_note: Borrowed from Loren Seller AI Agent because Retell create-agent API requires an existing LLM. Maya's actual NEPQ prompt (prompts/nepq_voice_agent.md) needs to be loaded into a dedicated Maya LLM in the Retell dashboard, then this agent re-pointed via retell_update_agent. Until then, Maya will reason against the Seller agent's prompt — DO NOT activate in production yet.
first_message_en: Hey, thanks for calling HandyMan Pro — South Florida remodeling. This is Maya, the virtual front desk. What's going on at the house?
first_message_es: Hola, gracias por llamar a HandyMan Pro. Soy Maya, la recepcionista virtual. ¿En qué le ayudo hoy?

deploy_status.next_step: In Retell dashboard → LLMs → create new LLM with prompts/nepq_voice_agent.md as system prompt → grab llm_id → run retell_update_agent({agent_id: 'agent_cb542686e718d0b43f489be30f', response_engine_llm_id: '<new_llm_id>'})
